allow: Bash(cd /tmp/emaps && find . -iname "*IN_*.py" -not -path "./.git/*" | head -20; echo "---"; find . -type d -name "parsers" -not -path "./.git/*" | head)

Bash(/usr/bin/curl -sk --max-time 30 -X POST "https://www.wrldc.in/OnlinestateTest1.aspx/GetRealTimeData_state_Wise" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -A "Mozilla/5.0" -d '{"date":"2026-06-11"}' -o wrldc_statewise_sample.json -w "WRLDC: HTTP %{http_code} size %{size_download}\\n")

Bash(/usr/bin/curl -sk --max-time 30 -b wrldc_cookies.txt -X POST "https://www.wrldc.in/OnlinestateTest1.aspx/GetRealTimeData_state_Wise" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Requested-With: XMLHttpRequest" -A "Mozilla/5.0" -d '{"date":"2026-06-11"}' -o wrldc_statewise_sample.json -w "api: %{http_code} %{size_download}\\n")

Bash(/usr/bin/curl -sk --max-time 30 -X POST "https://meritindia.in/StateWiseDetails/BindCurrentStateStatus" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -A "Mozilla/5.0" -d '{"StateCode":"MHA"}' -o merit_currentstatus_MHA.json -w "BindCurrentStateStatus: HTTP %{http_code} size %{size_download}\\n")

Bash(/usr/bin/curl -sk --max-time 30 -X POST "https://meritindia.in/StateWiseDetails/GetStateWiseDetailsForPiChart" -H "Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8" -A "Mozilla/5.0" -d '{"StateCode":"MHA","date":"09 Jun 2026"}' -o merit_piechart_MHA.json -w "HTTP %{http_code} size %{size_download}\\n")
